# `!assert`

**Category:** control

Abort the play (fail the task) when one or more templated condition expressions evaluate incorrectly.

## Parameters

| Name | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `msg` | string | no | Custom message shown when the assertion fails. |
| `true` | condition | no | A condition expression that must be true. |
| `false` | condition | no | A condition expression that must be false. |
| `all_true` | list | no | Every expression in the list must be true. |
| `all_false` | list | no | Every expression in the list must be false. |
| `some_true` | list | no | At least one expression in the list must be true. |

## Examples

```yaml
- !assert
  name: Ensure enough disk space
  true: (gt disk_free_pct 20)
  msg: free disk below 20%
```
